name: IntroDB Skip
description: Automatically skip TV show intros using IntroDB and IntroHater.
overview: Sync intro markers from IntroDB and IntroHater APIs to support skip intro workflows.

versions.changelog: V2.2.3 - Implemented Aggressive Skip for Android. Retries seek command if client is buffering. Improved device detection.
V2.2.2 - Enhanced Android detection and detailed logs for Auto-Skip. Fixed potential timing issues in playback start.
